isEqual.isEmpty: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN
isEqual.isNotEmpty: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN

select.isNotEqual: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND ISUSE = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) > 0
SELECT ALERT , COMPLETE , BANSONG , CALLBACK , HESONG , SAVEMAILFLAG FROM TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF WHERE UserID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT '1' ALERT , '1' COMPLETE , '1' BANSONG , '1' CALLBACK , '1' HESONG , 'Y' SAVEMAILFLAG
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) <> 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PWDINFO SET FLAG = #v_PFLAG#, PWD = #v_PPWD#, PWDTYPE = #v_PPWDTYPE# WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PWDINFO ( USERID, FLAG, PWD, PWDTYPE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PUSERID#, #v_PFLAG#, #v_PPWD#, #v_PPWDTYPE#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF ( USERID, ALERT, COMPLETE, BANSONG, CALLBACK, HESONG, SAVEMAILFLAG, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PUSERID#, #v_PALERT#, #v_PCOMPLETE#, #v_PBANSONG#, #v_PCALLBACK#, #v_PHESONG#, #v_PSAVEMAILFLAG#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF SET ALERT = #v_PALERT#, COMPLETE = #v_PCOMPLETE#, BANSONG = #v_PBANSONG#, CALLBACK = #v_PCALLBACK#, HESONG = #v_PHESONG#, SAVEMAILFLAG = #v_PSAVEMAILFLAG# WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMSEQ FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE USERID = #v_pUserID# AND ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT ( ITEMSEQ, USERID, RESULT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pItemSeq#, #v_pUserID#, #v_pResult#, #tenantID# )

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ( COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , IFNULL(EndDate, DATE_FORMAT('1900-01-01', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) EndDate FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ( COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT #v_pCount#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , ENDDATE FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , IFNULL(ENDDATE, DATE_FORMAT('1900-01-01', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) EndDate FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ( COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ ASC LIMIT #v_pTotal# - #v_pStart# ) temp ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT #v_pCount#

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ITEMSEQ , STARTDATE , POLLSELECTIONCOUNT , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , ANSWER1 , ANSWER2 , ANSWER3 , ANSWER4 , ANSWER5 , ANSWER6 , ANSWER7 , ANSWER8 , ANSWER9 , ANSWER10 , IFNULL(B.RESULT, 0) Result FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL A LEFT JOIN TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMSEQ = B.ITEMSEQ AND USERID = #v_pUserID# WHERE (COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top' ) AND STARTDATE < DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND ENDDATE IS NULL AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT 1

select.isEqual: SELECT ID , NAME FROM TBL_PS_WEBPARTGROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT ID , NAME FROM TBL_PS_WEBPARTGROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top'

sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMSEQ FROM TBL_PS_USERWEBPART WHERE USERID = #v_PUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )

SELECT NAME, URL, DEFAULTPOSITION AS POSITION, DEFAULTPRIORITY, ID FROM TBL_PS_WEBPARTITEM A JOIN TBL_PS_WEBPARTITEMACL B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID='S907000' OR COMPANYID='Top') AND DEFAULTUSE=1 AND ACCESSID IN ('gisa1','top','Top','S907000','RAB1') ORDER BY DEFAULTPOSITION, DEFAULTPRIORITY

SELECT B.NAME, B.URL, A.ITEMPOSITION AS POSITION, A.ITEMSEQ, B.ID FROM TBL_PS_USERWEBPART A JOIN TBL_PS_WEBPARTITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ID JOIN TBL_PS_WEBPARTITEMACL C ON C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND C.ITEMID=B.ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.USERID='gisa1' AND C.ACCESSID IN ('gisa1','top','Top','S907000','RAB1') ORDER BY A.ITEMPOSITION, A.ITEMSEQ

SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.TITLE , A.TITLE2 , A.DESCRIPTION , A.DESCRIPTION2 , B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FilePath , A.CN FROM TBL_PS_EMPMONTH A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE TERM = #v_PTERM# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY TERM DESC

SELECT ITEMSEQ , WIDTH , HEIGHT , POSITION FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE ( COMPANYID = 'Top' OR COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# ) AND STARTDATE <= DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND ENDDATE >= DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.QUICKLINKID QuickLinkID , QUICKLINKNAME , QUICKLINKNAME2 , QUICKLINKNAME3 , QUICKLINKNAME4 , LINKTYPE , LINKTYPEURL , URL , REGUSERID , VIEW_FLAG , SIZE_ FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK A JOIN TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL B ON A.QUICKLINKID = B.QUICKLINKID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.REGDATE DESC
SELECT RESULT , COUNT(RESULT) COUNT FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RESULT ORDER BY COUNT DESC, RESULT ASC

SELECT ITEMSEQ , STARTDATE , IFNULL(ENDDATE, DATE_FORMAT('1900-01-01', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) EndDate , POLLSELECTIONCOUNT , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , ANSWER1 , ANSWER2 , ANSWER3 , ANSWER4 , ANSWER5 , ANSWER6 , ANSWER7 , ANSWER8 , ANSWER9 , ANSWER10 FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT RESULT , COUNT(RESULT) COUNT FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RESULT ORDER BY RESULT
SELECT PASSWORD FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #cn#
